title: Kizaru Lands on Egghead
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Kizaru, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6, York as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Sorry, unc, I gave my word...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And since when have you been one to get chummy with pirates?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I owe the old man my life... Huff..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care whose side I gotta take if it helps him escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought we were meant to deal with the bear attacks...

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: some kid beat us to it?

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 16 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
